name: Diamond Genesis Drops
description:
Ten utility-tier passes from Project Diamond — the AI-coordinated rewards club on Base. Each Genesis Drop unlocks one specific Diamond perk: AI concierge, members Discord, monthly digital drops, partner mint priority, Royal Ruby discount, summit invite, and governance voice. Open-edition lazy mint via OpenSea. Holders are auto-rostered into the Diamond Pass Utility allowlist when the 1,111-supply ERC-721 deploys.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing, no investment contract. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md for the full perk schedule.
